data.title: The Cyberspace Administration of China: In 2026, it will advance key cyber legislation and expand the rule of law in foreign-related cyberspace.
data.description: The Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) convened a national conference on cyber rule of law in Beijing on April 8. The conference emphasized that 2026 marks the 105th anniversary of the founding of the Communist Party of China and the first year of the 15th Five-Year Plan. To effectively carry out cyber rule of law work in the current and future periods, it is crucial to focus on overall coordination, strengthen organizational leadership, planning guidance, and mechanism building to enhance the overall effectiveness of cyber rule of law work. Efforts should be made to accelerate and improve efficiency, advance key cyber legislation, strengthen the construction of Party regulations, expand the construction of cyber rule of law related to foreign affairs, and continuously improve the cyber legal norms system. Emphasis should be placed on law enforcement, strengthening cyber law enforcement in key areas, consolidating the foundation of cyber law enforcement work, improving supervision and guidance of cyber law enforcement, and enhancing the capacity and level of cyber law enforcement. Fairness and justice should be emphasized, promoting the improvement of judicial governance rules, deepening judicial protection of cyber rights, strengthening judicial punishment of cybercrime, and continuously strengthening the functions and roles of cyber justice. Legal publicity should be emphasized, expanding the content and connotation of cyber legal education, deepening the construction of cyber legal education brands, building a "comprehensive cyber legal education" framework, and leveraging the fundamental role of cyber legal education. Finally, law-based administration should be emphasized, improving the legal literacy of cadres, strengthening supervision of the exercise of power, standardizing administrative review and litigation, and accelerating the construction of a law-based government in the cyberspace field.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: 5,000 ETH to be sold today
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation announced on the X platform that it will exchange 5,000 ETH for stablecoins today through CoWSwap's TWAP feature as part of its ongoing efforts to fund research, grants, and donations. Previously, the Ethereum Foundation sold 416.67 ETH in exchange for 933,300 DAI.

data.title: Caldera launches Metalayer Token Launcher, supporting one-click issuance of cross-chain MetaTokens.
data.description: Caldera has announced the launch of the Metalayer Token Launcher, allowing users to create and issue MetaTokens without writing code. Deployment is completed simply by setting the token name, total supply, and Treasury wallet. The tool initially supports Arbitrum and Ethereum, providing near real-time cross-chain bridging between the two chains, with each token having its own independent cross-chain bridge page. Future updates will support more blockchain networks, further lowering the barriers to on-chain economics and token issuance.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation sold 416.67 ETH in exchange for 933,300 DAI.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the Ethereum Foundation has sold 416.67 ETH in exchange for 933,300 DAI.

data.title: Crypto's Instant Settlement Model Criticized for Capital Inefficiency
data.description: Ethan Buchman has highlighted concerns regarding the capital inefficiency of the cryptocurrency market's instant settlement model. According to NS3.AI, Buchman pointed out that the current system requires each trade to settle independently rather than being netted. This design compels firms to pre-fund transactions, move more assets than necessary, and tie up liquidity as trading volumes increase.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Strategy is the main factor driving Bitcoin inflows.
data.description: JPMorgan released a report stating that total inflows into digital assets in Q1 2026 were approximately $11 billion, annualized to about $44 billion, roughly one-third of the same period in 2025. Analysts such as Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou pointed out that retail and institutional investor inflows were relatively low or even negative, with Q1 inflows primarily driven by Bitcoin purchases by strategy firms and concentrated crypto venture capital funding. The crypto market as a whole declined in Q1, with total market capitalization falling by about 20%, Bitcoin falling by about 23%, and ETH falling by over 30%. The sell-off was driven by macroeconomic and geopolitical pressures, with altcoins experiencing even larger declines. Prices stabilized towards the end of the quarter, with Bitcoin consolidating around $70,000. The report noted that CME futures positions in Bitcoin and ETH weakened compared to 2024 and 2025, and spot Bitcoin and ETH ETFs saw net outflows in Q1, mainly concentrated in January, with Bitcoin ETF inflows rebounding somewhat in March. Strategy remains the primary buyer, mainly funding Bitcoin purchases through equity issuances, while other corporate holders have been relatively conservative, selling some Bitcoin for buybacks. Bitcoin miners were net sellers this quarter. Crypto venture capital funding has increased at an annualized pace higher than in the previous two years, but is concentrated in a few large deals, with funds continuing to flow into infrastructure, stablecoins, payments, and tokenization.

data.title: Russell 2000 Index Reaches Over One-Month High with 3.4% Increase
data.description: The Russell 2000 Index has achieved its highest level in over a month, experiencing a 3.4% increase. According to ChainCatcher, this marks a significant rise for the index, reflecting positive market movements.

data.title: ZachXBT disclosed data from an internal payment server used by North Korean IT workers, involving 390 accounts and over $3.5 million in funds.
data.description: According to ZachXBT, an anonymous source shared data stolen from an internal payment server in North Korea, covering 390 accounts, chat logs, and cryptocurrency transaction information. Since the end of November 2025, the related payment wallet addresses have received over $3.5 million, with funds transferred out through exchanges or converted into fiat currency and deposited into Chinese bank accounts via platforms such as Payoneer. On-chain tracking shows that the internal payment addresses are linked to known clusters of North Korean IT workers, and one of the Tron payment addresses was frozen by Tether in December 2025. Three related companies on the user list have been sanctioned by OFAC, including Sobaeksu. ZachXBT has compiled a complete organizational chart, with data covering the period from December 2025 to February 2026.

data.title: Ethereum News: Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Hits $180B Record as Institutional Tokenization Accelerates
data.description: Key TakeawaysToken Terminal reports $180B stablecoins on Ethereum, all-time high.Ethereum controls ~60% of global stablecoin supply.Total stablecoin market reached $315B in Q1, signaling strong liquidity growth.Institutions like BlackRock and JPMorgan expanding tokenization on Ethereum.Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Reaches Record $180 BillionEthereum’s stablecoin ecosystem has reached a new milestone, with total onchain supply hitting $180 billion, according to Token Terminal.The figure represents roughly 60% of total global stablecoin supply, reinforcing Ethereum’s position as the dominant settlement layer for digital dollars.Over the past three years, Ethereum’s stablecoin supply has grown by approximately 150%, reflecting rising adoption across both crypto-native and institutional use cases.Institutional Adoption Drives GrowthThe expansion is closely tied to institutional activity in tokenized assets and onchain finance.Major financial players—including BlackRock, JPMorgan, and Amundi—have launched tokenized products on Ethereum, increasing demand for stablecoins as settlement and liquidity layers.Jamie Dimon recently acknowledged the rise of blockchain-based competition, citing stablecoins, smart contracts, and tokenization as emerging forces reshaping finance.Tokenization Trend Signals Trillion-Dollar OpportunityLooking ahead, Token Terminal projects that $1.7 trillion could move onchain across networks over the next four years.Ethereum alone could capture up to $850 billion in new flows by 2030 if current growth trends continue.Separately, Standard Chartered has estimated that more than $1 trillion could shift from traditional banking into stablecoins by 2028, further supporting long-term demand.Ethereum Maintains Dominance Across EcosystemData from RWA.xyz places Ethereum’s stablecoin value slightly lower at $168 billion, but still confirms its leadership with 56% market share.When including Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) chains and layer-2 networks such as Arbitrum, zkSync, and Base, Ethereum’s effective share rises above 65%.This dominance highlights Ethereum’s role as the primary infrastructure layer for:StablecoinsTokenized real-world assets (RWAs)Institutional onchain finance

data.title: 易理华在币安广场AMA复盘加密周期：长期看多，但需尊重周期与波动
data.description:
4月8日晚，Liquid Capital 创始人易理华在币安广场直播中表示，他自2015年底进入加密行业，经历过两三轮牛熊后，整体仍倾向于“长周期看多”，但前提是不能过度乐观，必须正视市场的周期性与“巨大的波动性”。在他看来，加密资产的回撤与反弹幅度都远超传统市场，投资者需要在波动中保持清醒与风险意识。
谈及今年市场压力，易理华将其归因于多重外部因素叠加：宏观层面降息预期未兑现、地缘局势扰动、政策推进不及预期，以及部分叙事（如“国家战略”等）降温；再结合四年周期影响，他认为回调可能超出原先计划。但他同时强调，这更多是外部金融环境与周期共同放大短期波动，长期角度对ETH的核心判断并未改变。
在策略层面，他认为2022-2023年后一级投资难度显著上升：早期一级项目周期更短、流动性释放更快，但随着市场结构及解锁/流通安排变化，投资人窗口期明显收窄，一级“没以前好做”，因此他逐步减少一级出手，并将更多精力放到二级市场的研究与机会捕捉上。
易理华还总结自己观察到的投资人分化：一类“机构化”加密VC虽有框架与研报，但在趋势退去后缺乏稳定盈利模式，生存压力加大；第二类深耕细分赛道、具备专业壁垒并能产生现金流的投资人更稳健；第三类来自传统金融、交易更克制、偏向核心资产长期配置的人，往往在周期中表现更好。他分享称，曾在2018年建议一位传统投资人以约5%资产配置BTC，对方长期持有、不参与山寨币交易，后续该仓位在资产中占比明显提升。
此外，他强调AI正在加速重塑竞争格局：过去两三个月他投入更多精力学习AI，并推动被投企业向AI转型，认为未来不理解或不会使用AI的个人与团队可能被快速淘汰。
针对外界“推高再退出”等争议，他回应称投资最终取决于资产价值与趋势，大体量市场难以被单一参与者推动。

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks surged at the open on the US stock market, with SharpLink (SBET) rising over 10%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 2.86%, the S&P 500 rose 2.62%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 3.61%. The crypto sector saw a broad rally, with SharpLink up 10.10%, Strategy (MSTR) up 8.45%, Bitmine up 8.13%, Coinbase up 7.56%, Circle up 7.42%, and Solana up 2.73%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: French CAC40 Index Surges 5% in Daily Trading
data.description: The French CAC40 index experienced a significant increase of 5% in daily trading, reaching 8,304.55 points. According to ChainCatcher, this surge marks a notable movement in the market. The rise in the index reflects a positive trend in the French stock market.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Airline Stocks Surge with United Airlines and Delta Airlines Leading Gains
data.description: U.S. airline stocks experienced a notable increase, with United Airlines and Delta Airlines leading the charge. According to Jin10, United Airlines saw its stock rise by 13%, while Delta Airlines reported an 11% increase. This upward trend reflects positive investor sentiment in the airline sector, driven by factors such as improved travel demand and favorable market conditions. The gains in these major airlines highlight a broader recovery in the industry, as companies continue to adapt to changing consumer behaviors and economic dynamics.

data.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Prompts Quick Return of Abu Dhabi Executives
data.description: Following the agreement between the US and Iran on a two-week ceasefire, Bloomberg posted on X that an executive from an Abu Dhabi fund immediately booked a flight back to the Emirati capital. Another executive has announced plans to return over the weekend. This development comes as tensions ease between the two nations, allowing for increased movement and business activities in the region.

data.title: Adam Back: The quantum threat to Bitcoin is still far off, but the window of opportunity for migration has opened.
data.description: In an interview with Bloomberg, Blockstream CEO Adam Back stated that quantum computers do not currently pose a real threat to the Bitcoin network, but the industry should begin preparations immediately. He pointed out that current hardware generally lacks error correction capabilities, and quantum risks are a long-term challenge rather than a short-term crisis. Back emphasized that the core issue is not reaching a consensus on when quantum computers will become sufficiently threatening, but rather providing Bitcoin holders with approximately a ten-year window to migrate their keys to a quantum-resistant format. He stated that a 20-person research team is currently conducting related work, publishing papers, and implementing practical deployments, with Blockstream's Liquid network already in use as an early testing platform. Furthermore, post-quantum cryptography has moved from the theoretical stage to the implementation stage, with NIST finalizing relevant standards by the end of 2024. The main challenge facing the industry is how to coordinate an orderly migration before the risks become imminent.

data.title: Crypto News: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin ETF With 0.14% Fee, Challenging BlackRock’s $55B IBIT Dominance
data.description: Key TakeawaysMorgan Stanley launches MSBT spot Bitcoin ETF with 0.14% fee, lowest in market.BlackRock IBIT remains leader with ~$55B AUM and highest liquidity.MSBT leverages $7 trillion wealth management network to drive flows.Move signals growing fee competition and distribution-driven ETF market shift.Morgan Stanley Enters Bitcoin ETF Market With Low-Cost OfferingMorgan Stanley has launched its spot Bitcoin ETF, trading under the ticker MSBT, marking one of the most significant new entrants into the crypto ETF market.The fund debuts with a 0.14% expense ratio, undercutting the 0.25% fee charged by BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), currently the dominant product in the sector.IBIT Remains Market Leader in Liquidity and ScaleDespite the new competition, IBIT continues to lead across key metrics:~$55 billion in assets under managementHighest trading volume among Bitcoin ETFsDeep options market liquidityThis liquidity advantage has made IBIT the preferred vehicle for active traders and institutional positioning.Distribution Power May Shift ETF FlowsMorgan Stanley’s competitive edge lies in its distribution network.With access to $7 trillion in client assets through its wealth management arm, the bank can direct capital toward MSBT via financial advisors, potentially reshaping inflow dynamics.In contrast to IBIT’s strength in trading liquidity, MSBT is positioned to capture flows through advisory-driven allocations.Fee Compression Signals Market MaturityThe launch highlights a broader trend toward fee competition in the Bitcoin ETF market.As more established financial institutions enter the space:Cost sensitivity among investors is increasingFee differentials are becoming a key differentiatorCompetition is shifting from trust and scale to pricing and accessMarket Structure Splits Between Liquidity and DistributionThe Bitcoin ETF market is increasingly bifurcated:IBIT: Dominates liquidity, trading, and derivatives activityMSBT: Competes on cost and distribution reachThis dynamic reflects a maturing market where investor preferences differ between active trading and long-term allocation channels.First Real Challenge to IBIT’s DominanceMorgan Stanley’s entry represents the most credible challenge yet to IBIT’s market leadership.While IBIT’s liquidity advantage is unlikely to be displaced in the near term, MSBT’s lower fees and distribution strength could gradually shift inflows.The key question going forward is whether:Advisors begin reallocating client capital into MSBTFee competition accelerates across issuersIBIT’s dominance in inflows begins to erodeFor now, the launch marks a new phase of competition in Bitcoin ETFs, where pricing and distribution may become as important as scale and liquidity.

data.title: Digital Asset Investment Products See $224 Million Weekly Inflows
data.description: Digital asset investment products experienced net weekly inflows totaling $224 million, according to CoinShares. Bitcoin was a significant contributor, attracting $107.3 million. According to NS3.AI, the week also saw minor outflows influenced by stronger retail sales data, hawkish investor expectations, and mixed geopolitical signals.

data.title: Crude oil plunges over 13%, while precious metals and European stock indices rebound strongly.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,797.46 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.95%. Silver prices rose to $77.110 per ounce, a daily increase of 5.76%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 44.90, a daily decrease of 6.89%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 66.54, a daily decrease of 2.66%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.45% to 6.82332. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 1.02% to 157.985. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 4.09% to 5,941.30 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 2.48% to 10,677.73 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 3.95% to 24,151.35 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 16.62% to $92.81 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 13.65% to $93.93 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Analyst Predicts Bond Market Cautious on U.S. Rate Cuts Despite Ceasefire
data.description: John Briggs, an analyst at Natixis, stated that even after the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement, the bond market may remain hesitant to price in significant U.S. rate cuts. According to Jin10, while the situation has notably eased, the impact of the conflict on inflation remains unclear. Briggs noted that a signal from the Federal Reserve indicating comfort with their policy and confidence in the progress of inflation transmission might be necessary. Despite anticipating two rate cuts this year and looking to buy on dips, he emphasized the importance of patience. He also projected that long-term bond yields would be higher than short-term yields.

data.title: Currenc Group Inc. Completes Tokenization of Common Stock on Securitize Platform
data.description: Currenc Group Inc., a fintech AI solutions company based in Singapore, has announced the completion of its common stock tokenization on the Securitize platform. According to Foresight News, this initiative supports both Ethereum and Solana blockchain networks. The move aims to advance a new model for public markets, enabling stocks to be not only digitally represented but also more functional within modern financial systems.
